author: Laura Liu
text_zh: 師傅非常認真，電話聯絡後當天就抽空來現場勘查，給了清楚的報價與施工時間，讓人非常安心。
text_en: The technician was very conscientious — he came to survey the site the same day we called, and gave a clear quote and appointment time. Very reassuring.

author: 王應明
text_zh: 水塔進水故障,師傅現場評估後備齊材料,一下子就安裝完成,收費也合理。
text_en: Our water tower had an intake fault. He assessed it on-site, had the materials ready, and installed the fix in no time — at a fair price.

author: Leon Chang
text_zh: 服務態度很好，施工整潔，馬桶裝得很漂亮，報價合理，這年頭好的水電真的難找。
text_en: Great attitude and clean workmanship — the toilet was installed beautifully at a very reasonable price. Good plumbers are hard to find these days.

author: 江雁寧
text_zh: 打電話過去沒多久師傅就出發過來了，處理迅速、收費公道，非常推薦。
text_en: A technician was dispatched shortly after we called. Fast service and fair pricing — highly recommended.

author: ANITA GU
text_zh: 電表燒壞原本以為當天修不好，沒想到師傅很快就處理完成，效率超高。
text_en: We thought a burnt-out meter couldn't be fixed the same day, but the team got it done fast. Super efficient.

author: Sherry Tseng
text_zh: 老闆很有耐心，會給專業的建議，備料和安裝都很有效率。
text_en: The owner is patient and gives professional advice. Both sourcing materials and installation were very efficient.

author: happy happy
text_zh: 專業又客氣，報價實在不亂加價，施工快速，做完還把現場整理得乾乾淨淨。
text_en: Professional and courteous, with an honest quote and no upselling. Fast workmanship, and they left the site spotless.

author: Sabrina
text_zh: 早上打電話說排水管堵塞，下午師傅就到了,處理速度很快。
text_en: Called in the morning about a clogged drain and a technician arrived by the afternoon. Very fast service.
